Petrobras signs contracts for Platforms P-84 and P-85
Bonga South West Aparo subsea EPC expression of interest
Wisting environmental impact assessment programme consultation

independent_source.publisher: Angola National Oil, Gas and Biofuels Agency
independent_source.title: Final Investment Decision for Greater PAJ

independent_finding.statement: ExxonMobil reports a US$12.7 billion investment for the Uaru development and names its FPSO Errea Wittu.
independent_finding.notes: The amount is development investment, not demonstrated to be FPSO-only cost.

independent_finding.statement: ExxonMobil reports a US$12.7 billion investment for Whiptail and names its FPSO Jaguar.
independent_finding.notes: The amount is development investment, not demonstrated to be FPSO-only cost.

independent_finding.statement: TotalEnergies took FID in October 2024 for a development including a 220,000 bpd FPSO.
Petrobras identifies P-84 as the Atapu second unit, planned for production in 2029; Atapu already produces through P-70.
independent_finding.notes: The visual's generic Atapu Development label and Producing stage mix the operating field with its future expansion.

independent_finding.statement: Petrobras identifies P-85 as the Sépia second unit, planned for production in 2030; Sépia already produces through FPSO Carioca.
independent_finding.notes: The visual's generic Sépia Development label and Producing stage mix the operating field with its future expansion.

independent_finding.statement: Equinor describes a roughly US$9 billion field development with an FPSO and expected 2028 start-up.
independent_finding.notes: The US$9 billion figure is explicitly project development investment, not FPSO-only cost.

independent_finding.statement: Petrobras environmental documentation includes Búzios 10 among planned FPSO developments.
independent_finding.notes: This verifies identity, not the visual's CAPEX value or a specific P-number mapping.

independent_finding.statement: Petrobras environmental documentation includes Búzios 11 among planned FPSO developments.
Petrobras environmental documentation includes Búzios 9 among planned FPSO developments.
A 2026 SNEPco tender identifies Shell as operator and shows active procurement for the BSWA field development.
independent_finding.notes: Tender activity does not establish FID or validate the visual's US$8 billion value.

independent_finding.statement: Equinor says Wisting remains pre-FID, has selected an FPSO concept, and plans a possible FID at the end of 2027.
Indonesia's government confirms Tangkulo as a South Andaman gas-condensate discovery; independent evidence does not establish Yinson as operator.
independent_finding.notes: Mubadala Energy operates South Andaman; Yinson was named by the comment in a potential FPSO-provider context.

independent_finding.statement: Equinor confirms a Bay du Nord concept based on an FPSO with subsea tiebacks.
BW Offshore confirms selection to perform the Bay du Nord FPSO pre-FEED study.
independent_finding.notes: Pre-FEED selection is narrower than a final FPSO construction or operating contract.

independent_finding.statement: TotalEnergies is conducting ESIA consultation for a proposed Venus field development in Block 2913B offshore Namibia.
independent_finding.notes: Proposed development; no FID or comparable CAPEX established by this source.

independent_finding.statement: ANPG confirms Greater PAJ means Palas, Astrea and Juno and is operated by Azule Energy offshore Angola.
ANPG confirms FID on 22 June 2026 for Greater PAJ in Blocks 31 and 31/21, operated by Azule Energy.
